name: realtor-ai-admin
description: The Agent Leverage OS — a real estate agent's AI admin. Books the calendar (conflict-checked, guests invited, video link attached), drafts email in the agent's voice, sorts the inbox every morning, remembers every client, and delivers a 7am briefing. REQUIRES the Realtor AI Brain plugin (same marketplace): install it and run 'Set up my Brain' first — AI Admin reads everything from the Brain and never re-interviews the agent. On-the-go Dispatch: just talk while mobile (remember this, remind me, draft a quick email, just showed the Lees) and it captures, acts, and reports back.
